Package org.eventb.internal.pp.core

Class Dumper

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.pp.core.Dumper
public final class Dumper extends Object
This class is responsible for dumping data structures.

Either a ResetIterator or an Object might be given to this dumper. A call to dump() will then output the content of these data structures to the console if the DEBUG flag is set.

  • Method Details

    • debug

      public static void debug(String message)

    • addDataStructure

      public void addDataStructure(String name, ResetIterator<Clause> iterator)
      Adds a ResetIterator to the dumper.

      Each time dump() is called, all elements of the iterator will be output to the console.

      Parameters:
      name - the name of this data structure
      iterator - the content of this data structure

    • addObject

      public void addObject(String name, Object object)
      Adds an object to the dumper.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of this object
      object - the object to be output to the consule

    • dump

      public void dump()
      Dumps all registered data structures if is set to true.
